title: UX Strategist and Project Coordinator
description:
About Us:


Digipixel is a Cyber Trust Certified (Tier 3), award-winning digital agency specialising in User Experience (UX) design, branding, and cybersecurity-centric digital solutions. We create secure, scalable, and creative digital experiences that help businesses grow with confidence.

About the Role:


We are seeking a dynamic UX Strategist & Project Coordinator with solid web experience to join our growing team. This hybrid role is perfect for someone who can blend user-centric thinking with strong organisational skills. You'll be working closely with our designers, developers, and clients to deliver digital projects that are intuitive, impactful, and right on time.

Key Responsibilities:

UX Strategy:

  • Conduct user research, gather insights, and translate them into actionable recommendations.
  • Develop user journeys, personas, and wireframes to guide the design and development process.
  • Collaborate with the design and development teams to ensure that user experience principles are embedded in every project.
  • Lead UX audits and usability reviews for client websites and propose improvements.
  • Advocate for user-first thinking across all projects.

Project Coordination:

  • Serve as the bridge between clients and internal teams, ensuring clear communication and smooth project flow.
  • Assist in gathering project requirements, developing scopes, and defining project milestones.
  • Manage timelines, deliverables, and dependencies across multiple web and digital projects.
  • Organise internal reviews and client meetings, keeping all parties aligned and informed.
  • Track project progress, flag risks early, and ensure deadlines are met without compromising quality.

What We're Looking For:

  • Background: Minimum 2 years' experience in UX design/strategy and digital project coordination, with proven hands-on experience in web projects (corporate websites, eCommerce, or web applications).
  • Web Experience: Strong understanding of website structures, UI/UX best practices for web, and familiarity with content management systems (preferably WordPress, Elementor, Shopify, etc.).
  • UX Skills: Solid grasp of UX research, wireframing, and user journey mapping. Proficiency with Figma or similar design tools.
  • Project Management: Strong organisational skills and experience managing digital/web projects.
  • Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills. Able to liaise confidently with both internal teams and clients.
  • Problem-Solver: Resourceful, solutions-driven, and able to anticipate challenges before they arise.
  • Attention to Detail: A meticulous approach to deliverables, timelines, and user experience standards.

Bonus Points If You Have:

  • Familiarity with Agile project management.
  • Basic knowledge of SEO and web accessibility best practices.
  • Experience working in a web agency

Why Join Digipixel?

  • Be part of a forward-thinking agency that fuses creativity, security, and clarity in projects
  • Work on diverse projects across industries with supportive, collaborative teammates.
  • Opportunities to grow your career with real ownership and impact.

postedCompany.description:
Digipixel, located in Kaki Bukit, Singapore, is a Cyber Trust Certified (Tier 2) digital agency and IMDA Pre-Approved vendor under the SMEs Go Digital programme. 


With our Pre-Approved eCommerce solution, eligible SMEs can access up to 50% funding through the Productivity Solutions Grant (PSG). Our services include strategic branding, marketing consultancy, custom web design, ecommerce and software development, all crafted to enhance your brand's reach and security. 


Our strategic branding and marketing consultancy is also eligible for up to 50% support under the Enterprise Development Grant (EDG). 


As a 3-time SME 500 award winner, Digipixel combines creativity with robust security, delivering solutions that protect and perform.
postedCompany.name: DIGIPIXEL PTE. LTD.
